latin: Miles solitarius ad solem respexit et bracchia late extendit. 'solem lauda!' clamavit. in mundo tam obscuro, lux erat spes ultima.

questions.prompt: What did the solitary knight do?
questions.target: He praised the sun with arms outstretched
choices: He praised the sun with arms outstretched

questions.prompt: What did light represent in this dark world?

translation: The solitary knight looked up at the sun and stretched his arms wide. 'Praise the Sun!' he shouted. In a world so dark, light was the last hope.
